title: Support - App, user is logged during install process, correct data
scenario: Verify that the Support screen in the mobile app displays correct app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection after login during onboarding.
steps: Check the App button and verify it displays the following data: app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection.
expected: The App button displays correct data including app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection.
